codeReview.summary: The fix closes the saved-lookups rehydration gap by moving the dashboard from one-time mount hydration to a storage-backed subscription while still updating state immediately on successful lookups. This keeps recent Riot IDs truthful after deep-link loads, saved-lookup reselection, filter changes, and refresh without regressing dedupe/order behavior.

summary: Reviewed the prior scrutiny finding, feature transcript skeleton, handoff evidence, commit 98d4587, and the touched dashboard/saved-lookups code. The new subscribeToSavedLookups flow and regression coverage truthfully address the persisted-state issue behind VAL-CROSS-002, and I found no blocking or non-blocking defects in scope.
